LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA N.A.'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES IS OFF CALENDAR. THE PROOF OF SERVICE REFLECTS THAT PLAINTIFF SERVED THE MOTION ON DEFENDANT'S FORMER COUNSEL, THE LAW OFFICES OF ROBERT S. GITMEID. HOWEVER, ON AUGUST 12, 2019, DEFENDANT KELLY CHUKUNTAROD FILED A SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY NOTIFYING THE PARTIES THAT HE IS REPRESENTING HIMSELF. PROPER SERVICE MUST BE MADE ON DEFENDANT AT HIS ADDRESS. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of And Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation Of The Parties
Off Calendar Oct-08-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

There being no appearance, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA N.A.'s Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation Of The Parties is Off calendar. The proof of service reflects that Plaintiff served the motion on defendant's former counsel, the Law Offices of Robert S. Gitmeid. However, on August 12, 2019, Defendant Kelly Chukuntarod filed a substitution of attorney notifying the parties that he is representing himself. Proper service must be made on Defendant at his address.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
